entities.name: Index Gentium
entities.description: Country Catalog: A comprehensive catalog of detailed country representations and state transitions, supporting in-depth study and comparative of/between social regions.

entities.name: Spatium Productorum
entities.description: Product Space is a representation of all products (goods and services) present in the market throughout history.

entities.name: Spatium Technicae
entities.description: Technique Space is a representation of the technical core (techniques and technical objects) underpinning production throughout history.

entities.name: Spatium Patentes
entities.description: Patent Space represents all research and technical work conducted by companies to support product development.

entities.name: Spatium Investigationis
entities.description: Research Space represents the technical or scientific research conducted by non-enterprise entities.

entities.name: Spatium Societatis
entities.description: Firm Space represents all firms within the global economy.
